oracleProblems.title: Accessibility Widget Vendor vs. Own-Site Compliance
oracleProblems.description: Lodgify sells an accessibility widget (via Skynet Technologies) supporting WCAG 2.0/2.1/2.2 AA, yet their own marketing site has 15+ images with empty alt text, broken heading hierarchy, and missing ARIA labels. This creates a credibility oracle: is the product trustworthy if the vendor cannot meet the standards they sell?

oracleProblems.title: Performance vs. Tracking Script Density
oracleProblems.description: 30+ third-party scripts (analytics, OptinMonster, Tidio, HubSpot) compete with page load performance. Marketing needs tracking data; users need fast page loads. 631.7KB page with 63% image weight degrades mobile UX.

oracleProblems.title: Visual Design Aesthetics vs. Color Contrast Compliance
oracleProblems.description: Brand colors (#FF3B59 red, #03EBC3 teal) may not meet WCAG AA 4.5:1 contrast ratios against white backgrounds. Design team prioritizes brand identity; accessibility requires sufficient contrast.

oracleProblems.title: Conversion-Optimized CTAs vs. Screen Reader Navigation
oracleProblems.description: Multiple dropdown triggers use href='#' which confuse screen readers. Mobile hamburger has no aria-label. No skip-to-content link exists. Conversion optimization focuses on visual users while assistive technology users face barriers.

criticalFindings.title: 15+ Images with Empty Alt Text
criticalFindings.description: Hero image, partner logos, feature screenshots, and trust badges all have alt='' making them invisible to screen readers.

criticalFindings.title: Broken Heading Hierarchy
criticalFindings.description: H4 appears before H1, footer uses H5 without H3/H4 ancestors. Screen readers cannot build proper document outline.

criticalFindings.title: Mobile Hamburger Button Missing Accessible Name
criticalFindings.description: Hamburger navigation button has no aria-label, only visual span.icon-bar elements.

criticalFindings.title: Insufficient Color Contrast
criticalFindings.description: Background and foreground colors do not meet WCAG AA 4.5:1 contrast ratio in multiple areas.

criticalFindings.title: No Skip-to-Content Link
criticalFindings.description: Keyboard users must tab through entire navigation before reaching main content.

criticalFindings.title: Dropdown Toggles Missing aria-expanded
criticalFindings.description: Navigation dropdown triggers lack aria-expanded attribute to communicate state to assistive technology.

criticalFindings.title: Excessive Third-Party Script Loading
criticalFindings.description: 30+ third-party scripts loaded on page including analytics, chat widgets, popup tools, and form integrations.
criticalFindings.impact: Page load time, Core Web Vitals, mobile experience

criticalFindings.title: SVG Logo Missing Accessible Name
criticalFindings.description: SVG logo element lacks aria-label or title element for screen reader identification.

emptyAltText: Screen reader users receive no information about 15+ images including hero, partner logos, and feature screenshots
SEO crawlers cannot index image content reducing organic search visibility
Automated accessibility audits flag site as non-compliant risking legal exposure under ADA/EAA
brokenHeadingHierarchy: Screen readers generate incorrect document outline making page navigation impossible
Cognitive accessibility users who rely on heading structure cannot understand page organization
SEO heading signals are diluted reducing content relevance scoring
missingAriaLabels: Mobile users with screen readers cannot activate navigation hamburger button
Dropdown state changes are invisible to assistive technology users
Automated testing tools report false negatives on interactive element coverage

recommendations.title: Add descriptive alt text to all images
recommendations.description: Add meaningful alt text to hero image, partner logos, feature screenshots, and trust badges. Empty alt='' should only be used for truly decorative images.

recommendations.title: Fix heading hierarchy
recommendations.description: Remove or restructure the H4 before H1. Ensure sequential descending order. Change footer H5 elements to appropriate level.

recommendations.title: Add aria-label to hamburger button
recommendations.description: Add aria-label='Toggle navigation menu' to the mobile hamburger button element.

recommendations.title: Add skip-to-content link
recommendations.description: Add a visually hidden skip link as the first focusable element that jumps to main content.

recommendations.title: Fix color contrast ratios
recommendations.description: Audit all text/background color combinations against WCAG AA 4.5:1 ratio. Adjust brand colors or add darker variants for text use.

recommendations.title: Add aria-expanded to dropdown toggles
recommendations.description: Add aria-expanded='false'/'true' to all navigation dropdown trigger elements and toggle on interaction.

recommendations.title: Optimize third-party script loading
recommendations.description: Defer or lazy-load non-critical scripts. Consider loading Tidio, OptinMonster, and analytics after user interaction.

recommendations.title: Add aria-label to SVG logo
recommendations.description: Add role='img' and aria-label='Lodgify home' to the SVG logo element.
